title: Feature Request: Organize Dashboards
excerpt: It would great if you could order and organize dashboards the same way as you can with boards

posts.cookedHtml: It would great if you could order and organize dashboards the same way as you can with boards

This would be nice. Dashboards belong in the workspaces as well.
Cheers Eltjo
